subject: Re: FW: Link
body:
rileys info..Daniel Angel Gonzalez (02.12.1967) was
married to Dawn M. Gonzalez (03.17.1969) on
07.21.1989. During the course of their marriage they
had Amber Maria Gonzalez and Saige Danielle Gonzalez.
Their marriage ended in shambles through a very very
nasty protracted divorce on 06.18.1991. Even through
the year 2005 filings were made in the case file – of
which I am getting a copy of.

 

Contempt citations apparently went back and forth
between Daniel and Dawn – each firing nasty
accusations, etc. Primary custody of the girls was
awarded to Dawn but it appears sometime in (maybe)
2005 primary custody moved to Daniel.

 

They have each been married, divorced and remarried
again.

 

I am doing a complete background on both of them and
their respective spouses..

 

In 1996 the Court ordered that they share the cost of
taking both girls (Amber and Saige) for mental health
counseling – also getting copies of that as well.

 

Daniel lives with his wife (either Erika or Tracey as
I am not sure who he is married to right now – however
I believe it is Tracey (25 years old). They both filed
for bankruptcy in 2004. They live at 16745 W. Downers
Drive, Loxahatchee, Fl 33470.

 

Dawn – who has since remarried and is known as Dawn
Marie Lavogue Sandberg lives with her husband, Paul,
at 411 Christopher’s Court, Waleska, GA 30183.

 

We believe that Amber has been living with Daniel for
some time and that Saige has just recently moved or is
moving back to Florida as I write.

 

We are undertaking some very discreet surveillance of
the house in order to observe and verify Saige is
really living there. We then plan to monitor her
activities this coming weekend to see if she parties,
etc. My thought is if she is just moving back to
Florida she’ll want to see and party with her friends
fairly quickly and this might allow us some insight
into her activities, etc.

 

 

--- Joe O'Donnell <jso@investigativemanagement.com>
